issue_summary: Owner reports that a claimed extra charge may not match the contract scope. The sample remains placeholder-only and requires human review.

contract_basis.note: Clause reference must be verified before formal use.
Quotation reference is trace-only until verified.

missing_information: Evidence status from contract evidence admin

Route disputed evidence to the AI PCM Supervisor.
Draft a neutral response that marks all placeholder data as non-formal.

human_review.reason: Dispute involves payment, change scope, and placeholder evidence.
